visuals.title: System Boot Process
visuals.description: Diagram showing the complete boot sequence from power-on through BIOS/UEFI, bootloader, kernel loading, to user login

diagrams.title: Boot Sequence Steps
steps: Power On: CPU starts executing firmware from ROM
BIOS/UEFI: POST checks hardware, initializes devices
MBR/GPT: Firmware reads disk to find bootloader
GRUB: Bootloader displays menu, loads kernel
initrd: Temporary filesystem provides essential drivers
Root FS: Real root filesystem mounted
init/systemd: PID 1 process starts system services
Login: System ready for user interaction
diagrams.notes: The boot process bridges the gap between hardware power-on and a fully functional operating system.
